data.title: China to Enhance Humanoid Robot Development
data.description: China's State Council Information Office held a press conference on January 21 to discuss the achievements in industrial and information technology development in 2025. According to PANews, Zhang Yunming, Vice Minister of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, stated that the ministry will continue to promote innovation and iterative upgrades in humanoid robot technology. This initiative aims to drive the development of the broader computational intelligence industry through advancements in humanoid robots. The ministry plans to enhance the quality of humanoid robot products and strengthen testing in network and data security. Additionally, it will conduct research and management services related to scientific ethics to ensure high-level security and quality development. Efforts will be made to accelerate the establishment of a humanoid robot ecosystem, with increased support from the National Artificial Intelligence Industry Investment Fund. Furthermore, the ministry intends to build an open-source community for humanoid robots and release guidelines for the comprehensive standardization of humanoid robots and embodied intelligence. These measures are aimed at promoting global sharing of innovative achievements.

data.title: Stablecoin project Noble announced it will migrate from the Cosmos ecosystem to an independent EVM network.
data.description: Noble, a Cosmos application chain focused on stablecoins, announced its migration from the Cosmos ecosystem to a separate EVM Layer 1 network, scheduled to launch on March 18. Noble stated that this move aims to leverage the Commonware technology stack written in Rust and the Reth Ethereum client to improve performance and gain broader support from AI and crypto developers. Since 2023, Noble has processed over 22 billion token transactions and boasts 30,000 monthly active users. Its native stablecoin, Noble Dollar (USDN), will be a core feature of the new EVM chain, supporting the distribution of rewards to users. During the transition, the team will continue to support Cosmos-based blockchains, ensuring existing IBC connections remain unaffected, with the ultimate goal of migrating all liquidity to the Noble EVM.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $230 million yesterday, with BlackRock's ETHA experiencing the largest net outflow at $92.3 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $230 million yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net outflow of $92.3 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $12.845 billion. This was followed by Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of $51.5354 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.617 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $18.411 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 5.07%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.683 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $483 million yesterday, with Grayscale GBTC experiencing the largest net outflow at $161 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $483 million yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Grayscale ETF (GBTC), with a net outflow of $161 million. GBTC's historical total net outflow has reached $25.574 billion. This was followed by Fidelity ETF (FBTC), with a single-day net outflow of $152 million. FBTC's historical total net inflow has reached $11.764 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $116.735 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.51%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $57.339 billion.

data.title: Galaxy plans to launch a $100 million hedge fund aimed at profiting from digital asset price fluctuations.
data.description: Mike Novogratz's cryptocurrency group, Galaxy, plans to launch a $100 million hedge fund in the first quarter of this year. The fund has already secured $100 million in investment from family offices, high-net-worth individuals, and large institutions, aiming to profit from the volatility of digital asset prices. The fund will invest up to 30% of its assets in crypto tokens, with the remainder invested in financial services stocks impacted by digital asset technology and law. Galaxy has stated it will provide seed funding for the fund. Galaxy currently manages $17 billion worth of digital assets. Joe Armao, head of the hedge fund, stated that the fund can profit by screening disruptors and differentiating between high-performing and low-performing companies in the financial services sector. Bitcoin is currently priced at approximately $90,000. (FT)

data.title: Investor Profits from UNI Token Trading Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: An investor has capitalized on recent market movements involving UNI tokens. According to PANews, the address 0x9671 sold 798,734 UNI tokens five days ago at a price of $5.33 each, realizing approximately $4.26 million. Following a market downturn, the same address repurchased 757,684 UNI tokens at $4.83 each, spending around $3.66 million. This short-term trading strategy resulted in a profit of about $600,000.

data.title: Keeta Network to Acquire Undisclosed Bank to Expand Financial Infrastructure
data.description: Keeta Network has announced an agreement to acquire a bank, though the specific institution remains unnamed. According to Foresight News, this acquisition is expected to significantly aid Keeta in integrating with traditional financial infrastructure and expanding its business operations, including obtaining necessary licenses. To support this initiative, Keeta has allocated 35 million KTA tokens from its strategic reserves. The acquisition process is subject to regulatory approval and is anticipated to take a considerable amount of time. Keeta claims to be the first in the industry to adopt this licensing model, with further details to be revealed soon.

data.title: Mezo Launches Statement Query Feature for Bitcoin Financial Network
data.description: Mezo has introduced a new Statement Query feature for its Bitcoin financial network. According to Foresight News, this feature allows users to view their transaction volumes on Bitcoin (BTC) and EVM chains. Users can also unlock Mats reward points based on their on-chain activities. Additionally, rewards can be further increased through tasks such as social sharing and on-chain interactions.

data.title: Domain Hijacking Targets Cryptocurrency Wallets
data.description: 23pds posted on X. It has been confirmed that the domains storewise.tech and vagueentertainment.com have been hijacked using this method. The compromised applications often disguise themselves as well-known cryptocurrency wallets such as Exodus, Ledger Live, or Trust Wallet, with interfaces that closely resemble the legitimate versions.

data.title: New Domain Resurrection Attack Targets Linux Snap Store
data.description:
A new type of 'domain resurrection attack' has been identified on the Linux Snap Store, according to PANews. The attack involves hackers taking control of expired developer domains and updating legitimate applications through official channels. These applications are then disguised as popular wallets like Exodus, Ledger Live, and Trust Wallet to trick users into entering their mnemonic phrases, leading to the theft of cryptocurrency assets. data.title: Steak ’n Shake to Reward Employees with Bitcoin Starting 2026
data.description: Steak ’n Shake, a U.S. fast-food chain, has announced a new incentive program for its hourly employees. According to PANews, starting March 1, 2026, employees at company-operated locations will receive a Bitcoin reward equivalent to $0.21 per hour worked. This initiative, supported by Fold, requires a two-year vesting period before employees can claim the reward. The company aims to enhance employee motivation and customer service quality while reinforcing long-term employee value.

data.title: Google Play to block unregistered crypto exchanges in South Korea
data.description:
Google Play will block unregistered overseas crypto exchange apps in South Korea from January 28, limiting access to major global platforms for Android users.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/google-play-to-block-unregistered-crypto-exchanges-in-south-korea/

data.title: New Domain Resurrection Attack Targets Linux Snap Store
data.description: A new type of 'domain resurrection attack' has been identified on the Linux Snap Store, according to PANews. The attack involves hackers taking control of expired developer domains and updating legitimate applications through official channels. These applications are then disguised as popular wallets like Exodus, Ledger Live, and Trust Wallet to trick users into entering their mnemonic phrases, leading to the theft of cryptocurrency assets. The domains storewise.tech and vagueentertainment.com have been confirmed as hijacked. This attack exploits the Snap mechanism, allowing originally trusted software to be embedded with malicious code without users' knowledge.
